barRaise.topFinding: Seventeenth review: the 06-11 working tree shipped, closing five of six standing MEDIUMs in commit faf1223 (minified bundle, single styles.css replacing the twelve-layer cascade, TypeScript aligned to 6 in preship.sh, Decision 30 logged, the N6 basket-coordinate gate added with audit_live_pin_data.py restored). But commit 9c78081 shipped a partial 'Yes& Chains' brand rename into user-visible surfaces (manifest, README, ToS, index.html) while PROJECT_SPEC and CLAUDE.md still say 'YesAndChains' seven times, reusing the v0.51.2 stamp a third time, with no changelog entry and no superseding decision for the locked BACKLOG 1.8 brand lock. That is the new HIGH and needs a Nick call: revert, or supersede 1.8 and propagate. A 0.51.3 catch-up entry, a new web+yac protocol boot route in src/main.ts, and three canonical-audit fixes sit uncommitted. Structural debt got dramatically better; process discipline slipped two milestones from a 1.0 brand cut. Verdict holds at needs-attention on the one HIGH.
